{{Infobox artifact
| name = Origin Shroud
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Origin Shroud]] is a device made from four priceless treasures that hides the origin of existence.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Origin Shroud]] resembles a living, shifting thread made from smoke and shadow.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Origin Shroud]] is a concealing item made by [[the Mad King]] and repaired by [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] stayed under the [[Origin Shroud]] for a long time.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
